title: Easter Egg Cookie Cutter | 3D Printed PLA Baking Tool | Medium 7-8cm | Spring Holiday Fondant Stamp Cutter
description:
Celebrate the joy of Easter with this beautifully designed Easter Egg Cookie Cutter, perfect for creating festive treats that everyone will love. Whether you're baking sugar cookies for an Easter egg hunt, decorating a spring dessert table, or simply enjoying a fun afternoon of baking with the kids, this cookie cutter delivers clean, crisp shapes every single time. The classic egg silhouette is instantly recognizable and pairs wonderfully with pastel icing, royal icing decorations, and sprinkles for a truly festive look.

Key Features:
• Carefully designed Easter egg shape with smooth cutting edges for clean, precise cuts
• 3D printed with high-quality, food-safe PLA material for reliable and safe baking
• Sturdy construction that holds its shape through batch after batch of cookie dough
• Works beautifully with sugar cookie dough, gingerbread dough, fondant, modeling clay, and even playdough for craft projects
• Lightweight yet durable — easy to handle for bakers of all ages, including little helpers in the kitchen
• Available in a cheerful color (color may vary slightly based on filament availability)

Dimensions:
This is a Medium (M) sized cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at its widest point. The cutting depth is approximately 1.5cm, which is ideal for most standard cookie dough recipes. This size is perfect for individual cookies that are not too small to decorate but not so large that they dominate a cookie platter.

How to Use:
For best results, roll your cookie dough to an even thickness of about 5-7mm on a lightly floured surface. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the dough, then lift straight up for the cleanest cut. If the dough sticks to the cutter, try dipping the cutting edge in a small amount of flour or powdered sugar before each press. For fondant work, lightly dust the cutter with cornstarch instead. You can also use this cutter for crafting projects with polymer clay, salt dough, or playdough — kids absolutely love making Easter-themed shapes for classroom activities and spring decorations.

Care Instructions:
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water (not hot) and gently remove any dough residue with a soft brush or toothpick. Allow the cutter to air dry completely before storing. Avoid prolonged exposure to heat or direct sunlight, as PLA can soften at high temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will last through many baking seasons.

Perfect Gift Ideas:
This Easter Egg Cookie Cutter makes a wonderful and thoughtful gift for so many occasions. Tuck it into an Easter basket alongside chocolate eggs and candy for a creative surprise that encourages baking fun. It is a fantastic addition to a housewarming gift basket, a birthday present for the avid baker in your life, or a stocking stuffer for the holiday season. Teachers, daycare providers, and craft-loving friends will especially appreciate this unique and practical little tool. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and a bag of sprinkles for a complete and charming gift set that anyone would treasure.

About Our Shop:
Every cookie cutter in our shop is lovingly designed and 3D printed to order in small batches, ensuring attention to detail and consistent quality with each piece. We are a small, passionate team dedicated to creating unique baking tools that bring creativity and joy to your kitchen. Because each item is printed individually, slight variations may occur, making every cutter truly one of a kind. Thank you for supporting our small business — we are so grateful to be part of your baking adventures!
